title: Freedom of information release: Digital and Technology
text:
A Freedom of Information release on the Trade Remedies Authority’s procurement and use of digital and technology products.

FOI procurement and use of digital and technology products

PDF, 88.8 KB, 1 page

This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.




Request an accessible format.



If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email contact@traderemedies.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.

FOI procurement and use of digital and technology products

PDF, 136 KB, 2 pages

This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.




Request an accessible format.



If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email contact@traderemedies.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
